mapper.select:
WITH base_eq AS ( SELECT E.EQ_ID, E.EQ_NAME, E.EQ_STATUS, E.EQ_SDATE, E.EQ_WPID, W.WP_NAME, W.WP_TYPE, S.EQ_STATUS_NAME FROM EQUIPMENT E
LEFT JOIN EQ_STATUS S ON E.EQ_STATUS = S.EQ_STATUS_NO
LEFT JOIN WORKPLACE W ON E.EQ_WPID = W.WP_ID
E.EQ_USAGE = 'Y'
AND E.EQ_WPID = #{eqWpid}
AND E.EQ_STATUS IN
#{status}
AND E.EQ_STATUS = #{eqStatus}
AND ( UPPER(E.EQ_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(E.EQ_NAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )
), target_eq AS ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, B.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM base_eq ORDER BY EQ_ID DESC ) B ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow} ), target_wp_type AS ( SELECT DISTINCT WP_TYPE FROM target_eq WHERE WP_TYPE IS NOT NULL ), wp_type_work_day AS ( SELECT PR.PROC_WP_TYPE AS WP_TYPE, COUNT(DISTINCT TRUNC(W.WORK_FDATE)) AS WORK_DAY_CNT FROM target_wp_type TWT
JOIN PROCESS PR ON PR.PROC_WP_TYPE = TWT.WP_TYPE
JOIN ROUTING_DETAIL RD ON RD.ROUT_DTL_PROC = PR.PROC_ID
JOIN ROUTING R ON R.ROUT_ID = RD.ROUT_DTL_ROUT
JOIN PLAN P ON P.PLAN_ITEM = R.ROUT_ITEM
JOIN WORK W ON W.WORK_PLAN = P.PLAN_ID
WHERE W.WORK_FDATE IS NOT NULL AND W.WORK_USAGE = 'Y' AND P.PLAN_USAGE = 'Y' AND R.ROUT_USAGE = 'Y' AND RD.ROUT_DTL_USAGE = 'Y' AND PR.PROC_USAGE = 'Y'
GROUP BY PR.PROC_WP_TYPE ), eq_run_hour AS ( SELECT L.EQ_RUN_EQID AS EQ_ID, SUM((NVL(L.EQ_RUN_ETIME, SYSDATE + (9/24)) - L.EQ_RUN_STIME) * 24) AS RUN_HOUR FROM EQ_RUN_LOG L
JOIN target_eq TE ON TE.EQ_ID = L.EQ_RUN_EQID
WHERE L.EQ_RUN_STIME IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY L.EQ_RUN_EQID ) SELECT TE.EQ_ID AS eqId, TE.EQ_NAME AS eqName, TE.EQ_STATUS AS eqStatus, TE.EQ_SDATE AS eqSdate, TE.EQ_WPID AS eqWpid, TE.WP_NAME AS wpName, TE.EQ_STATUS_NAME AS eqStatusName,
NVL(WD.WORK_DAY_CNT, 0) * 12 AS totalTime,
NVL(ROUND(RH.RUN_HOUR, 1), 0) AS runTime,
TO_CHAR( NVL( ROUND( NVL(RH.RUN_HOUR, 0) / NULLIF(NVL(WD.WORK_DAY_CNT, 0) * 12, 0) * 100, 1 ), 0 ) ) || '%' AS runRate
FROM target_eq TE
LEFT JOIN wp_type_work_day WD ON WD.WP_TYPE = TE.WP_TYPE
LEFT JOIN eq_run_hour RH ON RH.EQ_ID = TE.EQ_ID
ORDER BY TE.EQ_ID DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EQUIPMENT WHERE EQ_STATUS = #{eqStatus} AND EQ_USAGE = 'Y'

WITH target_eq AS ( SELECT E.EQ_ID, E.EQ_NAME, E.EQ_STATUS, E.EQ_SDATE, E.EQ_WPID, E.EQ_VENDOR, E.EQ_MANAGER, S.EQ_STATUS_NAME, W.WP_NAME, W.WP_TYPE, WT.WP_TYPE_NAME, V.VENDOR_NAME, EMP.EMP_NAME FROM EQUIPMENT E
LEFT JOIN EQ_STATUS S ON E.EQ_STATUS = S.EQ_STATUS_NO
LEFT JOIN WORKPLACE W ON E.EQ_WPID = W.WP_ID
LEFT JOIN WP_TYPE WT ON W.WP_TYPE = WT.WP_TYPE_NO
LEFT JOIN VENDOR V ON E.EQ_VENDOR = V.VENDOR_ID
LEFT JOIN EMP EMP ON E.EQ_MANAGER = EMP.EMP_ID
WHERE E.EQ_ID = #{eqId} AND E.EQ_USAGE = 'Y' ), eq_work_day AS ( SELECT TE.EQ_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT TRUNC(W.WORK_FDATE)) AS WORK_DAY_CNT FROM target_eq TE
JOIN PROCESS PR ON PR.PROC_WP_TYPE = TE.WP_TYPE
JOIN ROUTING_DETAIL RD ON RD.ROUT_DTL_PROC = PR.PROC_ID
JOIN ROUTING R ON R.ROUT_ID = RD.ROUT_DTL_ROUT
JOIN ITEM I ON I.ITEM_ID = R.ROUT_ITEM
JOIN PLAN P ON P.PLAN_ITEM = I.ITEM_ID
JOIN WORK W ON W.WORK_PLAN = P.PLAN_ID
WHERE W.WORK_FDATE IS NOT NULL AND W.WORK_USAGE = 'Y' AND P.PLAN_USAGE = 'Y' AND I.ITEM_USAGE = 'Y' AND R.ROUT_USAGE = 'Y' AND RD.ROUT_DTL_USAGE = 'Y' AND PR.PROC_USAGE = 'Y'
GROUP BY TE.EQ_ID ), eq_run_hour AS ( SELECT L.EQ_RUN_EQID AS EQ_ID, SUM((NVL(L.EQ_RUN_ETIME, SYSDATE + (9/24)) - L.EQ_RUN_STIME) * 24) AS RUN_HOUR FROM EQ_RUN_LOG L WHERE L.EQ_RUN_EQID = #{eqId} AND L.EQ_RUN_STIME IS NOT NULL GROUP BY L.EQ_RUN_EQID ) SELECT TE.EQ_ID AS eqId, TE.EQ_NAME AS eqName, TE.EQ_STATUS AS eqStatus, TE.EQ_SDATE + (9/24) AS eqSdate, TE.EQ_WPID AS eqWpid, TE.EQ_VENDOR AS eqVendor, TE.EQ_MANAGER AS eqManager,
TE.EQ_STATUS_NAME AS eqStatusName, TE.WP_NAME AS wpName, TE.WP_TYPE_NAME AS wpTypeName, TE.VENDOR_NAME AS eqVendorName, TE.EMP_NAME AS eqManagerName,
NVL(WD.WORK_DAY_CNT, 0) * 12 AS totalTime,
NVL(ROUND(RH.RUN_HOUR, 1), 0) AS runTime,
TO_CHAR( NVL( ROUND( NVL(RH.RUN_HOUR, 0) / NULLIF(NVL(WD.WORK_DAY_CNT, 0) * 12, 0) * 100, 1 ), 0 ) ) || '%' AS runRate
FROM target_eq TE
LEFT JOIN eq_work_day WD ON WD.EQ_ID = TE.EQ_ID
LEFT JOIN eq_run_hour RH ON RH.EQ_ID = TE.EQ_ID
SELECT count(*) FROM eq_log WHERE ELOG_EQID = #{eqId} AND ELOG_USAGE = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, L2.* FROM ( SELECT L.ELOG_ID AS elogId, L.ELOG_EQID AS elogEqid, L.ELOG_SDATE AS elogSdate, L.ELOG_EDATE AS elogEdate, L.ELOG_REASON AS elogReason, L.ELOG_CONTENT AS elogContent, L.ELOG_RESULT AS elogResult, L.ELOG_WORKER AS elogWorker, EMP.EMP_NAME AS elogWorkerName, L.ELOG_USAGE AS elogUsage
FROM EQ_LOG L
LEFT JOIN EMP EMP ON L.ELOG_WORKER = EMP.EMP_ID
WHERE L.ELOG_EQID = #{eqId} AND L.ELOG_USAGE = 'Y'
ORDER BY L.ELOG_SDATE DESC ) L2 ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}
SELECT WP_ID AS wpId, WP_NAME AS wpName FROM WORKPLACE where wp_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY WP_ID ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, R2.* FROM ( SELECT EQ_RUN_NO AS eqRunNo, EQ_RUN_EQID AS eqRunEqid, EQ_RUN_STIME + (9/24) AS eqRunStime, EQ_RUN_ETIME + (9/24) AS eqRunEtime, EQ_STOP_REASON AS eqStopReason FROM EQ_RUN_LOG WHERE EQ_RUN_EQID = #{eqId} ORDER BY EQ_RUN_STIME DESC ) R2 ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{page.startRow} AND #{page.endRow}

SELECT E.EMP_ID AS "eqManager", E.EMP_NAME AS "eqManagerName" FROM EMP E JOIN DEPT D ON E.EMP_DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO WHERE D.DEPTNO = 30
AND ( UPPER(E.EMP_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') OR UPPER(E.EMP_NAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY E.EMP_ID

SELECT VENDOR_ID AS "eqVendor", VENDOR_NAME AS "eqVendorName" FROM VENDOR
WHERE VENDOR_TYPE = 'E' and vendor_usage = 'Y'
AND ( UPPER(VENDOR_ID) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{_parameter} || '%')
OR
UPPER(VENDOR_NAME) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{_parameter} || '%') )
ORDER BY VENDOR_ID
SELECT WP_ID AS wpId, WP_NAME AS wpName FROM WORKPLACE WHERE WP_TYPE = #{wpType} and wp_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY WP_ID

SELECT EQ_RUN_NO AS eqRunNo, EQ_RUN_EQID AS eqRunEqid, EQ_RUN_STIME + (9/24) AS eqRunStime, EQ_RUN_ETIME + (9/24) AS eqRunEtime, EQ_STOP_REASON AS eqStopReason FROM EQ_RUN_LOG WHERE EQ_RUN_EQID = #{eqId} AND EQ_RUN_ETIME IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EQUIPMENT ( EQ_ID, EQ_NAME, EQ_STATUS, EQ_SDATE, EQ_WPID, EQ_VENDOR, EQ_MANAGER, EQ_USAGE ) VALUES ( 'EQ' || EQ_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{eqName}, 20, SYSDATE, #{eqWpid}, #{eqVendor}, #{eqManager}, 'Y' )

INSERT INTO EQ_LOG ( ELOG_ID, ELOG_EQID, ELOG_SDATE, ELOG_EDATE, ELOG_REASON, ELOG_CONTENT, ELOG_RESULT, ELOG_WORKER, ELOG_USAGE ) VALUES ( 'EL' || LPAD(ELOG_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 6, '0'), #{elogEqid}, #{elogSdate}, #{elogEdate}, #{elogReason}, #{elogContent}, #{elogResult}, #{elogWorker}, 'Y' )
INSERT INTO EQ_RUN_LOG ( EQ_RUN_NO, EQ_RUN_EQID, EQ_RUN_STIME, EQ_RUN_ETIME, EQ_STOP_REASON ) VALUES ( EQ_RUN_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{eqId}, SYSDATE, NULL, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE EQ_LOG SET ELOG_EDATE = #{elogEdate}, ELOG_REASON = #{elogReason}, ELOG_RESULT = #{elogResult}, ELOG_CONTENT = #{elogContent} WHERE ELOG_ID = #{elogId} AND ELOG_USAGE = 'Y'
